title: Build out proofing within Monday

posts.author: kswiss50 (Kendall Shortt)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to find out if there is a way to merge the Image Annotation column with the conversation bubble in one view, app, or something.

Use case:
Product managers point out specific changes on proof and then would have a place to approve/deny or debate on if the changes should happen.

Currently, the two are disconnected and require to go back and forth from the picture to the conversation. I would like to simplify it, if possible.
